intro: This Privacy Policy describes how PropSWOT LLC, doing business as EasyIntake App ("EasyIntake", "we", "our", or "us") collects, uses, discloses, and protects information when you access or use the EasyIntake App website, software platform, APIs, and related services (collectively, the "Service").
By using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

content.text: EasyIntake App is a workflow automation and data intake platform used by businesses, professionals, and organizations to collect and manage information from their customers, clients, or applicants.
Because the platform operates in a B2B2C model, there are two types of users:
Business Users
Organizations or professionals who use EasyIntake to collect information.
End Users
Individuals who provide information through forms or workflows created by Business Users.
Business Users control how they collect and use End User data. EasyIntake processes that data on behalf of Business Users.
We may collect several types of information.
Information You Provide
Information you voluntarily provide may include:

items: messages or communications sent through the Service

content.text: Business Users determine what information they collect from End Users.

This information helps us maintain security and improve the Service.

These systems may involve automated processing of submitted data.
Users remain responsible for verifying the accuracy of any automated outputs.
EasyIntake does not use customer data to train generalized AI models without authorization.
Business Users are responsible for:

items: obtaining necessary consent from End Users
ensuring lawful processing of End User information

content.text: EasyIntake acts as a data processor on behalf of Business Users.
Business Users are typically the data controllers responsible for their privacy obligations.
We do not sell personal information.
We may share information in the following circumstances:
With Service Providers

These providers are required to safeguard information.

Business Transfers
If EasyIntake is involved in a merger, acquisition, or asset sale, information may be transferred as part of that transaction.
We retain information only for as long as necessary to:
Business Users control how long their End User data is retained.
EasyIntake implements commercially reasonable security measures designed to protect information, including:
However, no internet transmission or storage system is completely secure.
Users are responsible for protecting their account credentials.
The Service may store or process information in countries other than where users reside.
By using the Service, you consent to such transfers.
We take reasonable steps to ensure appropriate safeguards are in place.
Depending on your location, you may have rights regarding your personal information.
These may include:
Requests regarding data collected by a Business User should be directed to that Business User.

items: opt out of certain data sharing

content.text: EasyIntake does not sell personal information.
Requests may be submitted through the contact information listed below.
The Service is not intended for individuals under the age of 18.
We do not knowingly collect information from children.
If we become aware that personal information from a child has been collected, we will delete it.
The Service may contain links to third-party websites.
EasyIntake is not responsible for the privacy practices of those websites.
Users should review the privacy policies of external sites.
We may update this Privacy Policy periodically.
Updates will be posted on this page with a revised effective date.
Continued use of the Service after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, you may contact us at:
PropSWOT LLC dba EasyIntake App
Email: support@easyintakeapp.com
Website: https://www.easyintakeapp.com
